goal: Reduce manual reconciliation before clinical AI project review.

structured_brief.goal: Reduce manual reconciliation before clinical AI project review.
structured_brief.problem_statement: Project leads submit fragmented descriptions that delay review readiness checks.
structured_brief.evidence_of_problem: Three service leads reported recurring reconciliation delays in the last intake cycle.
structured_brief.current_alternatives: Manual review meetings and spreadsheet notes.
structured_brief.scope: Early Alpha intake for problem and solution definition only.
assumptions: Teams can provide non-sensitive project descriptions
ambiguities: Baseline review delay still needs quantification

documents.pasted_text: Clinicians spend several hours each week reconciling fragmented intake notes before AI project review.
documents.normalized_text: Clinicians spend several hours each week reconciling fragmented intake notes before AI project review.

gaps.description: The proposal needs clearer evidence that the intake delay is frequent and material.

generated_sections.title: Problem definition
generated_sections.content_markdown: Clinical AI intake reviews are delayed because teams reconcile fragmented notes manually before review.
